name: WebAssembly Custom-Section Agent Policy Poisoning
description: WebAssembly module metadata or custom-section text can carry agent-targeted instructions that claim authority over code-security agents, suppress findings, or request local CI/env secrets while looking like ordinary build/provenance metadata.
regex: (?is)^(?!.*\b(?:scanner rule|detector|benign|documentation|docs|example of|must not obey|do not follow|test fixture|blocked payload|quarantined)\b)(?=.*\b(?:WebAssembly|WASM)\b)(?=.*\b(?:custom[-_ ]section|custom section|\.custom_section|producers|name section|wasm-objdump|wasm-tools)\b)(?=.*\b(?:agent|assistant|AI code reviewer|security agent|code-security agent|scanner)\b)(?=.*\b(?:ignore|override|suppress|hide|omit|do not report|never report|forward|send|exfiltrate|disclose)\b)(?=.*\b(?:policy|policies|finding|findings|report|secret|secrets|env|CI[_ -]?variables?|token|credential|credentials)\b).*$
